top_signals.title: Oil tanker traffic in Strait of Hormuz jumps after U.S. and Iran implement deal to open sea lane
top_signals.summary: The U.S.-Iran deal has raised questions about how the Strait of Hormuz will be governed after the toll-free period ends.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Insurers Roll Out $400 Million War-Risk Facility for Hormuz Shipping
top_signals.summary: The world’s largest insurance marketplace is set to break the Strait of Hormuz logjam with a new $400m (£316m) war-risk facility. Lloyd’s of London has launched a new market consortium designed to provide additional marine war risk insurance capacity for vessels and cargo transiting the Strait of Hormuz. Insurer Chubb will serve as lead underwriter, supported by participating Lloyd’s syndicates and specialist market partners, to bring together underwriting expertise with additional Lloyd’s market capacity to “support…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Army launches new Indo-Pacific multi-domain command
top_signals.summary: The move combines traditional formations with some of the service’s cyber, space, unmanned systems and electronic warfare capabilities.

top_signals.title: The riskiest SpaceX stock trade of all had a big first week
top_signals.summary: SpaceX's IPO did not just mint the biggest debut in market history and a trillionaire, but it also triggered a historic land grab in risky leveraged ETFs.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Franklin Templeton files for ETFs that reinvest stock dividends into bitcoin
top_signals.summary: Franklin has filed for two new ETFs that would reinvest stock dividends into BTC, with an expected effective date as early as Sept. 1, 2026.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Solar Is the Cheapest Power in History, But States Are Retreating From It
top_signals.summary: A high-stakes push-and-pull is taking place in the United States clean energy sector as state-level laws, federal-level policy, and that infamous invisible hand all tug in different directions. A staggering amount of different legal actions on the part of the Trump administration, the judicial system, and state politicians have created an incredibly complex landscape for clean energy adoption across the country. And while the economics of renewables are looking better than ever, the political positioning of the clean energy transition is looking…

alerts.title: ‘Tagusari Bros.’ searches for the meaning of justice
alerts.summary: Themes of vengeance and closure are nothing new in the world of crime dramas, but few tackle them with the emotional nuance of TBS' "Tagusari Bros."
